examples: Did you not ever go on your knees and pray for deliverance from all your sins and scoundrel's acts?
The opening scene shows them celebrating their sudden deliverance from war.
The Abbe Chatain did not come himself as the messenger of Lily's deliverance.
This implausible causal link was drawn on the very day of the city's deliverance.
When he stepped onstage in his tuxedo he was transformed into an instrument of deliverance.
